steps.title: Read the curve directions
steps.content: The parabola opens upward, so its coefficient must be positive. The line rises from left to right, so its slope must also be positive.

steps.title: Choose the matching system
steps.content:
The system with both positive coefficients is:
$$y=\frac{7}{16}x^2$$
$$y=\frac{7}{4}x$$
The answer is D.
